features.name: bidirectional pass transistor emulation with inout tri logic
features.description: Code should include a bidirectional signal connection using inout tri logic ports with conditional assignment emulating tranif0/tranif1 behavior

features.name: cross-coupled bidirectional signals with enable control
features.description: Code should include two inout tri logic signals cross-coupled through conditional assignments controlled by an enable signal
features.snippet:
assign w0 = en ? w1 : 'z;
assign w1 = en ? w0 : 'z;

features.name: conditional assignment to high impedance on inout port
features.description: Code should include an inout tri logic signal assigned conditionally with a high-impedance ('z) fallback value controlled by an enable
